title: 보험 상품 조회(종류별)
content:
SELECT INS.STD_GOODS_NO,
       PGB.GOODS_NO,
       PGB.GOODS_NM,
	   (SELECT CD_NM FROM ST_STD_CD WHERE GRP_CD = 'PD122' AND CD IN('01','02','03','04','06','07','31','32','33','34') AND PGB.TP_DTL_CD = CD) AS INSURE
  FROM PR_INSRNC_GOODS_REL_INFO INS, 
       PR_GOODS_BASE PGB
 WHERE 1=1
   AND INS.TGT_GOODS_NO = PGB.GOODS_NO
   AND PGB.SALE_STAT_CD = '01'
 ORDER BY INS.STD_GOODS_NO
